moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday with the highly anticipated final between Spain and Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: All eyes on Sunday as Spain take on Argentina in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final! Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Got your World Cup Final plans sorted for Sunday? It's Spain vs Argentina – prepare for fireworks!

angles.name: National Pride
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is almost here. Spain or Argentina – who deserves to be crowned world champions?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Unveiled
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is announced today, revealing the nation's new number one track and biggest movers.

angles.name: Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's Chart Friday! The new Official Singles Chart is out, who's celebrating a new number one this week?

angles.name: Top Track
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new chart! Is your favourite track in the Top 40, or even at number one?

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and activist M.I.A. turns 51 tomorrow, July 18th. Known for her genre-bending sound and hits like 'Paper Planes'.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A.! What's your favourite track from the 'Paper Planes' star?

angles.name: Dance Anthem
angles.copy: Get ready to move! M.I.A. celebrates her birthday tomorrow, bringing us some of the most iconic dance and hip-hop anthems of the last two decades.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19th. A true rock icon and astrophysicist.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a monumental Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's guitar work is legendary. Celebrate his 79th birthday this weekend with some classic Queen!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar hero Slash turns 61 on July 23rd. The British-American musician is celebrated for his iconic riffs and stage presence.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Icon
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the legendary Slash's 61st birthday! What's your ultimate Guns N' Roses track?

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: That top hat and Gibson Les Paul are instantly recognisable. Happy Birthday to the incredible Slash next week!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th. The singer, actress, and dancer has been a major force in pop culture for decades.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: Get ready to party! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 next Friday. What's your favourite J.Lo anthem to dance to?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From the Bronx to global superstardom, Jennifer Lopez has done it all. Happy Birthday to a true pop icon next week!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 next Sunday?! The Rolling Stones icon is still rocking. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Moves Like Jagger
angles.copy: Eight decades of rock and roll! Wishing a very Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger next week. Still got the moves!

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin!
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are breaking up for the summer holidays this week, marking the start of a long-awaited break for many families.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: That's it, school's out! Happy Summer Holidays to all the students and teachers across the UK!

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many! What are your plans for the long break?

moments.title: New ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Grips Viewers
moments.blurb: ITV's new moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premiered this week and is already generating buzz with its atmospheric Scottish setting.

angles.name: New Thriller Alert
angles.copy: Have you started watching ITV's new thriller 'The Dark' yet? Set in the Scottish wilderness, it's already got everyone talking!

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Looking for a new drama to get stuck into this weekend? 'The Dark' on ITV has just premiered and promises a gripping watch.
